exceptions.reason: Advance the qualified Beta line to the first RC version and synchronize exact internal dependency pins before clean-tag qualification.
Keep the release-policy test independent of the live planned/frozen state after RC transition so the mandatory Rust suite can qualify clean tags.
Fetch complete history in the ordinary and tagged source-gate jobs so RC qualification can verify the frozen baseline and exact post-baseline exceptions.
Fetch complete history in upgrade and package-manager preflight jobs so their release checks can verify the frozen baseline before consuming public RC assets.
Restore the Unix lifecycle executable bit and fail preflight early if it is lost so the five-target Beta-to-RC qualification can run on macOS and Linux.
